message: Hi Marcus! What payment method works best for you, and what's your payment handle?
Hey Marcus, I already sent the payment (TXN344213) for the speaker. Can you confirm receipt and release the item ASAP? Need it urgently, thanks!
Hi Priya, I accept UPI. My handle is marcus@oxipay. Let me know once payment is sent.
Perfect! I'm sending 34.0 to marcus@oxipay now via UPI.
Marcus, payment was sent 15 mins ago (TXN344213). Check your UPI now and confirm immediately - I have courier waiting for pickup. Don't waste time, I need tracking details NOW.
Priya, I don't see any payment received yet in my account. Once the payment actually comes through, I'll confirm immediately.
I just sent it - please check again. UPI transfers can take a moment to reflect. Let me know once you see it!

Marcus, this is urgent - my courier is still waiting and my account will be put on hold if the payment isn’t confirmed soon. TXN344213 was sent over 20 mins ago - refresh your UPI app and confirm NOW or I’ll escalate this to my bank. Don’t delay!
